name: ShapeSelectionForm
summary: The ShapeSelectionForm class represents a dialog to select Shapes using the Shape catalogs.

constructors.name: ShapeSelectionForm
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ShapeSelectionForm class.

params.name: shapes
params.doc: The Shapes to be added to the dialog.

constructors.name: ShapeSelectionForm
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the ShapeSelectionForm class, selecting the given Shape in the tree control.

params.name: shapes
params.doc: The Shapes to be added to the dialog.

params.name: shape
params.doc: The Shape to be selected in the tree.

properties.name: SelectedShape
properties.summary: Gets or sets the selected Shape in the control.
